scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start:backend:contracts: cross-env PORT=8090 NODE_ENV=development npm run start --prefix Backend
scripts.contracts:generate: npm run build --prefix Backend && start-server-and-test "npm run start:backend:contracts" http://localhost:8090/swagger.json "npm run contracts:generate:from-running-api"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix Backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
